trending.title: De Parade
trending.blurb: The world's only travelling theatre festival pitches its fairground of tents — 95+ makers of theatre, dance, mime and music plus food stalls and carousel-lit evenings.

trending.title: Het Landjuweel
trending.blurb: Amsterdam's oldest festival (since 1975) turns the free-haven artist village of Ruigoord into four days of DJs, live music, rituals and art performances.

trending.title: Milkshake Festival
trending.blurb: Open-minded, gloriously dressed-up dance festival mixing house, disco, pop, techno and dancehall with drag and voguing — kicking off Pride week.

trending.title: WorldPride Amsterdam
trending.blurb: Amsterdam hosts WorldPride 2026: two weeks of citywide street parties and culture, crowned by the world-famous Canal Parade through the grachten.

trending.title: Dekmantel Festival
trending.blurb: Peerless underground electronic festival in the forest — the sharpest techno, house and experimental line-up of the year.
